name: Grilled Sirloin Steak W/Mushroom-Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 to 6 center cut top sirloin steaks
1/2 cup Dry red wine or Madeira
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the wine sauce, sauté mushrooms, garlic, and onion in melted butter or margarine in a saucepan until the mushrooms are tender.
2. Add flour, stirring until blended; cook over medium heat for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Blend in tomato paste, salt, and pepper; stir in wine and stock until well-blended.
4. Simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Adjust seasoning if necessary.
5. Sprinkle steaks with lemon pepper.
6. Grill the steaks over moderately hot coals for 5 to 8 minutes per side for medium rare, or to a desired degree of doneness.
7. Serve with mushroom-wine sauce. Serves 4.
